Fig. 12. Performance comparison across models and datasets with different video lengths (Qwen denotes Qwen2.5-VL-7B).

Fig. 3. (a) Accuracy under sparse frame sampling (16–128 frames), with only minor degradation as fewer frames are used. (b) Index search time as a percentage of attention time across video durations, ranging from 17% to 28%. (c) I/O time decreases with larger block sizes, with a 30% reduction when increasing from 1 to 64 frames per block.
Fig. 7. Performance comparison (normalized) between ReKV, LiveVLM and MOSAIC across models and datasets. Lines indicate average values.
